---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Suggest a fix or improvement to the docs, cheatsheets, or examples
title: '[Docs] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Which page?

Link to the file or chapter (e.g. `docs/07-validation-with-zod.md`).

## What is unclear, missing, or wrong?

Describe the problem with the documentation.

## Suggested improvement

How would you make it clearer? A proposed wording or example is welcome.

## Who does this help?

E.g. "beginners", "Laravel developers", "interview preparation".
